rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relationship to Educ. Code §37.0818, which governs commissioning of peace officers by private schools. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 37.0818. PRIVATE SCHOOL PEACE OFFICERS. (a) This section applies only to a private school that has an enrollment of at least 1,500 students.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns an unrelated statute about private school peace officers.
